positive: Minimalist, high-contrast silhouette design featuring a majestic mountain range at sunrise, stylized into negative space, surrounded by abstract geometric elements like flowing ribbons and crescent moons. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and matte cream. The composition must be centrally balanced and highly scalable for screen printing. Clean lines, sharp edges, graphic vector art style, ultra-detailed, symmetrical arrangement, perfect for apparel print.
